name: sidon_3000
note: Singer over GF(53) gives a 54-element Sidon set in [0,2862]; over GF(47) gives 48 in [0,2256]. The exact best in [1,3000] is unclear in the literature — mid-fame range with real headroom. apr28 branch reflogs reached 59; the natural exploitative target is +1 extension via library.sat_extensions.
